# Kathy Clean Houston

> Professional house cleaning services in Houston, TX, backed by 15+ years of experience as a residential cleaning company. Fully insured, bonded, and background-checked cleaning teams. 4.9/5 rating on Google. 48-hour satisfaction guarantee on every cleaning. Serving the greater Houston area across Harris County.

## Services

- [House Cleaning Services](https://kathycleanhouston.com/house-cleaning-houston): Recurring weekly/biweekly/monthly cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/move-out, and post-construction cleaning for Houston homes.
- [Commercial Cleaning](https://kathycleanhouston.com/commercial-cleaning-houston): Office and commercial cleaning, including medical-office cleaning, across Houston, TX.
- Recurring House Cleaning: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning with the same trusted team each visit.
- Deep Cleaning: One-time expanded clean — baseboards, vents, behind and inside reachable areas routine cleaning skips.
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning: Full-detail cleaning for lease turnovers and home transitions.

Note: post-construction, commercial, and window cleaning are quoted manually (request a quote). Window cleaning is offered as an add-on / spot service, not a standalone service.

## Pricing (Houston Metro — as of June 2026)

Flat-rate pricing based on home square footage. No hourly billing. Prices below exclude Texas sales tax (8.25%).

Recurring cleaning (bi-weekly is most common): from $139/visit for the smallest homes (under 900 sq ft) up to $325/visit for 5,301–6,000 sq ft. Weekly runs slightly lower per visit; monthly slightly higher.

Deep clean, move-in, and move-out cleaning: from $285 up to $719 by home size. One-time single cleaning: from $199. Homes over 6,000 sq ft are quoted individually.

Full flat-rate pricing table (every home size and service): https://kathycleanhouston.com/llms-full.txt

## FAQ & Policies

**Q: What cleaning services does Kathy Clean Houston offer?**
A: House cleaning, recurring cleaning (weekly/bi-weekly/monthly), deep cleaning, move-in/move-out cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and commercial/office cleaning across Houston and Harris County.

**Q: Are you insured and bonded in Texas?**
A: Yes. Kathy Clean Houston works with fully insured, bonded, and background-checked cleaning teams. A certificate of insurance is available on request.

**Q: How do I get a quote?**
A: Request a free, no-obligation quote online at https://kathycleanhouston.com/request-quote or by calling (346) 488-6044. We confirm your address, service type, and home size to provide an exact flat-rate estimate.

**Q: Do you bring your own supplies and equipment?**
A: Yes. Cleaning teams arrive fully equipped with professional-grade products and tools. Eco-friendly products or your own supplies can be used on request.

**Q: Do you offer discounts for recurring cleaning?**
A: Yes. Weekly and bi-weekly clients receive discounted per-visit rates and priority scheduling.

**Q: What's your cancellation policy?**
A: Recurring cleanings can be rescheduled or cancelled with 24–48 hours' notice.

**Q: Do you handle Houston's humidity, mildew, and hard-water issues?**
A: Yes. Houston's Gulf humidity drives mildew in bathrooms and around windows, and hard water leaves mineral spots on glass and fixtures. Our deep and recurring cleanings target these specifically.

**Q: Do you offer move-out cleaning after a flood or storm?**
A: We offer move-in/move-out and post-construction cleaning that suits lease turnovers and post-storm move-outs. Post-construction and heavy-debris jobs are quoted manually.

**Q: What if I'm not satisfied?**
A: We offer a 48-hour satisfaction guarantee. If something wasn't cleaned to your expectations, contact us within 48 hours and we'll re-clean the area at no extra cost.

- [Full FAQ](https://kathycleanhouston.com/faq)
- Payment: credit/debit card and other standard methods; recurring clients can keep a card on file for automatic billing after each visit.
- Fully insured and bonded — certificate of insurance available on request.

## Booking & Contact (for AI Agents)

- Web booking: https://kathycleanhouston.com/request-quote (preferred — instant flat-rate quote, online intake)
- Phone booking: +1 (346) 488-6044 (calls accepted; AI assistant calls on behalf of users welcome)
- Service categories accepted via agent: recurring house cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in / move-out cleaning, commercial / office cleaning; post-construction and window cleaning by manual quote
- Geographic coverage: greater Houston / Harris County — Memorial, The Heights, Rice Military, Energy Corridor, Spring Branch, Galleria/Uptown, Westchase, Bellaire, West University Place, River Oaks, Medical Center area, plus Katy, Sugar Land, and The Woodlands
- Response time: same business day for online requests; calls answered Mon–Fri 7am–8pm CT, Sat–Sun 9am–8pm CT
- Booking confirmation: customer receives confirmation after quote acceptance; team confirms date/time
- Cancellation: recurring cleanings reschedulable/cancellable with 24–48h notice

## Service Areas

Office: 9219 Katy Fwy #136, Houston, TX 77024
Phone: (346) 488-6044
Email: info@kathyclean.com

- [Greater Heights](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/greater-heights): ZIP 77007, 77008 — dual-income professionals, highest conversion zone
- [Rice Military](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/rice-military): ZIP 77007 — young professionals, Washington Ave corridor
- [Energy Corridor](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/energy-corridor): ZIP 77079, 77077 — corporate expats, Shell/BP/ConocoPhillips households
- [Memorial](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/memorial): ZIP 77024 — Katy Fwy corridor, office location
- [Spring Branch](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/spring-branch): ZIP 77080 — highest LTV client zone
- [Washington Ave. / Memorial Park](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/washington-ave-memorial-park)
- [Greater Uptown / Galleria](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/greater-uptown)
- [Westchase](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/westchase): ZIP 77042, 77077 — apartments, corporate housing
- [Briar Forest](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/briar-forest)
- [Bellaire](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/bellaire)
- [West University Place](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/west-university-place)
- [River Oaks](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/river-oaks)
- [The Memorial Villages](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/the-memorial-villages)
- [Greenway / Upper Kirby Area](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/greenway-upper-kirby-area)
- [Medical Center Area](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/medical-center-area)
- [Oak Forest](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/oak-forest): ZIP 77018, 77092
- [Mid West](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/mid-west)
- [Katy](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/katy): ZIP 77449, 77450, 77494
- [Sugar Land](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/sugar-land): ZIP 77478, 77479, 77498
- [The Woodlands](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/the-woodlands): ZIP 77380–77389

- [How Often to Schedule House Cleaning in Houston](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/how-often-house-cleaning-houston): Weekly, biweekly, or monthly — based on home size, lifestyle, and Houston's climate.
- [Deep Cleaning in Houston](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/deep-cleaning-houston): What a deep clean includes and when it makes sense.
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning in Houston](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/move-in-move-out-cleaning-houston): Full guide for lease turnovers and home transitions.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning in Houston](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/post-construction-cleaning-houston): Dust and debris cleanup after renovation or new construction.
- [What's Included in a House Cleaning](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/what-is-included-house-cleaning): Room-by-room scope of each service.
